title: [YTPMV] JENNY (instrumental)
description:
Skipped the vocals, hope you don't mind, WowComics. The track was becoming crowded and noisy anyway.

Seems pretty nice when turned to music... even if it's slightly different that what you hear on your radio. I kept the video simple. If you still don't recognise it, the song is from my YTPMV tennis with WowComics, in which each of us took turns to add another "instrument" to the song.

I'm too lazy to add the download link.

This instrumental version was created in FL Studio 7 or something... it's also the first MP3 I exported, which was not based on a MIDI file. That's right, all from scratch. There's no program that can do this for you. Oh, and I also have a .mid piano version of this. You can hear the beginning in my last YouTube Poop: "This video was remade from porn" as the Doctor Hiatus theme.

So... cheers.
